channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: DOGE Officially Concludes, but Its Wins and Chainsaw Memories Remain
McConnell's Wife Elaine Chao Saw No Need for Immediate Return from China as Former GOP Leader Hospitalized
item.description: Elaine Chao remained in China on a planned trip while Mitch McConnell entered his third week of hospitalization, as online rumors about his condition circulate.

item.title: How Graham Platner's Campaign Unraveled: From Reddit Posts to Rape Allegation
item.description: From a Nazi tattoo to a sexting scandal, Graham Platner's Maine Senate campaign faced multiple controversies before a rape allegation shook his allies.

item.title: Former Democratic Mayor of State Capital City Pleads Guilty in Six-Figure Real Estate Bribery Scheme
item.description: Former Jackson, Mississippi mayor Chokwe Antar Lumumba accepted $50,000 in campaign contributions from undercover FBI agents posing as developers.
